## Summary

Describe the change briefly.

## Attribution

- [ ] Human-only change
- [ ] AI-assisted change

If you check `AI-assisted change`, the CI check will require the attribution
block below or an `AI-Attribution:` commit trailer.

If AI-assisted, fill in:

- Product:
- Provider:
- Model:
- Scope:
- Date:

Example:

```text
Attribution: OpenAI Codex
Provider: OpenAI
Model: GPT-5
Scope: src/convobox/adapters/codex.py
Date: 2026-07-15
```

## Validation

- [ ] Tests run
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Changelog updated, if user-visible
